title: Strengthen typed native recovery issue surfaces
summary: Turn native hydration failures into a richer typed recovery contract so the macOS inspector and source recovery card explain issue category, posture, and safest next step more truthfully.
acceptance_criteria: StudioNativeRecoveryIssue carries richer typed metadata than only title/detail and primary action.
The macOS recovery inspector and source recovery card expose clearer issue category and recovery posture without changing recovery behavior.
New recovery wording stays localized through StudioStrings and the shared string catalog.
Ticket validation, patch hygiene, repo contract validation, and a targeted HumbleStudioMac debug build pass for the slice.

evidence.note: HS-0019 ticket schema validated after enriching the native recovery issue contract.
Patch hygiene passed after wiring typed recovery category, posture, and action rationale into native recovery surfaces.
Repo contract validation passed after extending shared recovery strings and localized catalog entries.

evidence.path: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
evidence.note: Native macOS build succeeded after strengthening typed native recovery issue surfaces.

trigger.source_ref: Top 10 re-rank after HS-0018: import and reload failure workflow still lands in generic native recovery surfaces instead of clearly typed, truthful recovery UI.

commands: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
agent_notes: Keep recovery behavior unchanged; improve truth and specificity first.
Keep root checkout clean after lane claim and release.
